title: DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS - 211info
text: FARMERS MARKET FUND DOUBLE UP FOOD BUCKS Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Allows people to double SNAP dollars to spend on fresh produce at participating farmers markets, CSAs (community-supported agriculture), farm stands, and grocery stores. Website Portland, OR 97213 Eligibility: SNAP recipients Hours: Varies Email (503) 208-4495 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (503) 208-4495 Email Address: [email protected] INTAKE PROCEDURE: Use the website to find locations currently participating in the Double Up Food Bucks (DUFB) SNAP match incentive program. -Farmers markets: Walk in and visit the information tent to match up to $20 per day with DUFB for fresh fruits and vegetables. -Grocery stores: Visit a participating grocery store, pay with a SNAP card, and get up to $20 with DUFB for free fresh fruits and vegetables. -CSA: Find farms using the locator map, sign up, pay monthly with a SNAP card, and each week get a box of fresh fruits and vegetables. DUFB are automatically applied. -Farm Stands: Go to a participating farm stand, pay with a SNAP card, and get a 50% discount on local fruit, vegetables, and produce. FEES: None DOCUMENTS: SNAP EBT Card (Oregon Trail Card) AREA SERVED: State of Oregon Services: Farmers Markets * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Fresh Food * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Grocery Stores * Food Stamps/SNAP Recipients Other Services Offered At This Location: FOOD - COMMUNITY SUPPORTED AGRICULTURE FOOD - FARMERS MARKETS FOOD - PRODUCE MATCH If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. FARMERS MARKET FUND
